params.text: Patient reviewed. Stable vital signs. Home medications reviewed and reconciled. Patient experienced an unexpected clinical occurrence during stay; patient and family informed and discussion documented. Monitoring parameters in place. Plan for discharge with appropriate precautions and follow-up arranged.

data.text: Patient reviewed. Stable vital signs. Home medications reviewed and reconciled. Patient experienced an unexpected clinical occurrence during stay; patient and family informed and discussion documented. Monitoring parameters in place. Plan for discharge with appropriate precautions and follow-up arranged.

params.plan_text: Discharge to home with family support. Patient and family educated on signs and symptoms to monitor for following recent clinical occurrence. Return precautions reviewed: seek immediate medical attention for any new or worsening symptoms. Follow-up appointment scheduled with primary care provider within 1 week. Home health services arranged for initial monitoring period. Medication reconciliation completed; continue home medications as prescribed. Activity restrictions: avoid strenuous activity for the next 2 weeks. Safety measures in place at home environment verified with family.

data.plan_text: Discharge to home with family support. Patient and family educated on signs and symptoms to monitor for following recent clinical occurrence. Return precautions reviewed: seek immediate medical attention for any new or worsening symptoms. Follow-up appointment scheduled with primary care provider within 1 week. Home health services arranged for initial monitoring period. Medication reconciliation completed; continue home medications as prescribed. Activity restrictions: avoid strenuous activity for the next 2 weeks. Safety measures in place at home environment verified with family.

params.message: Discharge planning in progress for patient. Family engaged and educated on monitoring and return precautions. Home health services coordinated. Please ensure follow-up appointment is confirmed and document any additional patient or family questions regarding the recent clinical occurrence.
